# Record attributes: `bio_att`

This step selected and added attribute columns. The data attributes gathered from `bio_fst` were: 

* `data_name`
* `pa` (presence/absence)
* `ind` (indigenous status)
* `obs` (observer)
* `sens_survey` and `sens_taxa` (denoting sensitive records)
* `survey`
* `method`

Text attribute columns were generated by concatenating any unique values for that taxa and bin. The `pa` attribute column was generated by taking the maximum value per bin, thus any presence of a taxa in a bin resulted in a presence in that bin for that taxa (even if there were also any absences).

Also see [spatial attributes](#sptatt) for attribution of records based on spatial data.
